meaning: adj.雕像般的,均衡的,轮廓清晰的
examples: A statuesque female avatar walks up, standing over him.
So we try to make them a little more perfect, a little more statuesque, if that's at all possible.
Virtual henchman stand statuesque in three dimensions on stage as Batman looms onscreen behind them.
As he reached out to hold the statuesque body, the lovely form dissolved in ripples of water.
